meaning: n.榄斿姏,鍏ヨ糠,榄呭姏,杩锋亱,寮虹儓鐖卞ソ
examples: The girls listened in fascination as the story unfolded.
He had a fascination for submarines and joined this branch of the service.
The fascination of the game lies in trying to guess what your opponent is thinking.
Wildlife has been a source of fascination and inspiration for artists for thousands of years.
Unlike, say, cricket, this is a sport that takes on a fascination the longer you watch.
